metadata.title: [MAI] Fluento AI - Your Personal English Tutor
metadata.description: [MAI] Master English speaking with AI conversations, real-time feedback, and daily challenges. Join the waitlist today.

hero.title: [MAI] Speak English Confidently
hero.description: [MAI] Master English speaking with AI-powered conversations, real-time feedback, and daily challenges. Your personal language tutor in your pocket.

features.title: Everything you need to become fluent
features.description: Our comprehensive suite of tools ensures you get the practice and feedback required to speak English confidently.

items.f1_desc: Engage in natural, spoken conversations with an AI that understands context and nuance.
items.f2_desc: Get real-time feedback on your accent and pronunciation down to the phoneme level.
items.f3_desc: Learn from your mistakes with gentle, contextual grammar corrections during your chats.
items.f4_desc: Build a habit with bite-sized daily challenges designed to expand your vocabulary.
items.f5_desc: The AI adapts to your proficiency level and focuses on the areas where you need the most help.

waitlist.title: [MAI] Ready to speak fluently?
waitlist.description: [MAI] Join the waitlist today to secure your early access spot and lock in exclusive launch pricing.
waitlist.successDesc: [MAI] Keep an eye on your inbox. We'll notify you as soon as your spot is ready.
waitlist.errorGeneric: [MAI] Something went wrong. Please try again.

founder.visionP1: At Fluento AI, we envision a future where language is never a barrier to learning, communication, or opportunity.
founder.visionP2: India is home to hundreds of languages and diverse cultures. We believe every learner should be able to start their learning journey in the language they are most comfortable with and gradually build confidence in English and other global communication skills.
founder.visionP3: Our vision is to create India's most inclusive AI-powered learning platform, supporting learners across multiple Indian languages while helping them connect with a world of opportunities.
founder.missionP1: Our mission is to provide personalized AI-driven learning experiences that adapt to each learner's language, pace, and goals.
founder.missionP2: Through intelligent conversations, speaking practice, grammar improvement, vocabulary building, and progress tracking, Fluento AI aims to make learning accessible to students from every corner of India.
founder.missionP3: We are committed to building a platform that respects linguistic diversity while empowering learners to communicate confidently in a connected world.
founder.thoughtsP1: India's strength lies in its diversity. Millions of talented students have great ideas and abilities, but language barriers often limit their confidence and opportunities.
founder.thoughtsP2: Fluento AI was created with a simple belief: learning should begin in the language people understand best.
founder.thoughtsP3: Our goal is not only to teach English but also to build a bridge between local languages and global opportunities. Whether a learner speaks Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Kannada, Malayalam, Odia, Assamese, or any other Indian language, they should feel welcomed and supported.
founder.thoughtsP4: Technology should adapt to people, not force people to adapt to technology.
founder.thoughtsP5: That is the future we are building with Fluento AI.

footer.description: Your personal AI English tutor, available 24/7 to help you speak with confidence.

howItWorks.title: How Fluento AI works
howItWorks.description: A simple, effective process designed to get you speaking from day one.

steps.s1_desc: Start a conversation on any topic. The AI listens and responds naturally, just like a human tutor.
steps.s2_desc: Receive immediate corrections on your pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary usage after every exchange.
steps.s3_desc: Track your progress over time and watch your fluency score increase as you build a daily habit.

appPreview.title: Experience the future of language learning
appPreview.description: Fluento AI wraps advanced language models into an intuitive, beautiful interface that makes daily practice feel like a chat with a friend.
appPreview.bullet2: Dark mode optimized for late-night sessions
appPreview.bullet3: Fluid animations and real-time voice waveforms

phone.msg1: Hi! Ready for today's English practice? Let's talk about your weekend.
phone.msg2: Yes! I went to the park and read a book.
phone.msg3: That sounds lovely! Small tip: you could say "I went to the park and read a book." The pronunciation of "read" in past tense is like the color "red."

roadmap.title: The Journey Ahead
roadmap.description: We are working hard to bring Fluento AI to everyone. Here is our plan.
roadmap.betaDesc: Early access for waitlist members to test core conversational features.
roadmap.androidDesc: Official release on the Google Play Store with full speaking challenges.
roadmap.iosDesc: Coming to the App Store with seamless Apple ecosystem integration.
roadmap.advancedDesc: Real-time accent adjustment, specialized vocabulary packs, and more.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The core conversational features will have a free tier. We will also offer a premium plan for advanced features and unlimited speaking time.
faq.a2: We are currently in beta testing. Join the waitlist to get early access!
faq.a3: Fluento AI focuses on teaching English, but you can converse and receive explanations in Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Bhojpuri, and many other regional Indian languages.
